creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthew Stobbs from comment #0)

Hi Matthew, thanks for the update.

The port builds fine, but it crashes for me in two different computers with 12.0 amd64.

On first boot, the wizard appears and I select the directory to store the notes, but after that the program segfaults. Any attempt to launch the program again results in a segfault.

Could you look into this?
